base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of elec_man — a character (boss) from 1987 mega man. Elec Man — lightning-bolt attack from both arms. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Elec Man — lightning-bolt attack from both arms; vertical beam. 281×206 sheet
